name: The Bitmap Test Suite (David Charlap)
license: Public Domain dedication (project metadata + COPYING in archive)
attribution_or_notice_required: Not legally required by the dedication, but provenance notice strongly recommended
suggested_usage: Vendor a curated subset for CI; keep full corpus optional for local stress testing

name: BMP Suite (Jason Summers)
license: Generator code GPLv3; generated image files public domain except embedded ICC profiles
variants: OS/2 v1 and OS/2 v2 BMP
attribution_or_notice_required: Not required for PD images, but include provenance and note ICC-profile exception
suggested_usage: Vendor selected BMPs only; do not vendor generator code unless GPLv3 implications are accepted; exclude ICC-profile BMPs

name: ConvertICO BMP sample files
license: Website Terms of Service with restrictive material-use clauses
suggested_usage: Optional manual interoperability smoke test only after legal review

name: John Burkardt BMP data page (FSU mirror)
license: FSU mirror says web page information is MIT; does not clearly license the binary BMP files
variants: Not a broad BMP conformance set
suggested_usage: External/manual only if needed; request explicit file license from maintainer

name: John Burkardt BMP data page (older mirror)
license: Mirror claims code/data under GNU LGPL; conflicts with newer mirror wording
attribution_or_notice_required: Would require LGPL compliance if this mirror is authoritative
suggested_usage: Do not vendor until mirror conflict is resolved

name: Hlevkin test images collection
license: No explicit license statement found on collection page
variants: Not focused on BMP header/compression conformance

name: Upstream shaozilee/bmp-js test fixtures
license: Repository is MIT, but fixture provenance/original source license is not documented
attribution_or_notice_required: Need provenance confirmation before relying on MIT umbrella
suggested_usage: Treat as temporary only; replace with explicitly licensed or generated assets

name: In-repo deterministic fixture generator
attribution_or_notice_required: No external attribution required; keep generator script in repo
suggested_usage: Preferred source for malformed fixtures and byte-precise encoder assertions
